chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.137 of 2024 Abdul Kareem Askani & another Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 830/24 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 831/24 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA 832/24 Dated: 25.04.2024 Syed Ahsan Imam Rizvi for appellants. Mr. Rehan Kayani for respondent No.2. -.-.- After about 15 minutes of argument by learned counsel for appellants, Mr. Rehan Kayani has informed by way of interruption that neither the very suit in which impugned orders have been passed exists/ pending, as it was decreed, nor any contempt application is pending as the same was not pressed. It was then realized by learned counsel for the appellant that perhaps there is nothing in this appeal left to be argued. He has consumed 15 minutes of the Court unnecessarily by pressing his appeal in respect of impugned order which does not exist as merged. With these facts when neither the suit is pending as it was decreed nor the contempt application, as it was not pressed, no order against which this appeal has been preferred, could survive. The appeal as such is dismissed along with listed applications however with cost of Rs.5,000/- (Five Thousand) to be deposited with High Court Clinic in a week’s time. Judge Judge
